// pages/student/StudentHome.jsx import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { internships, trainings } from '../../data/mockData'; import InternshipCard from '../../components/InternshipCard'; import './StudentHome.css'; const QUICK_STATS = [ { icon: '📋', label: 'Applications', value: '4', sub: '1 in review', color: 'lavender' }, { icon: '📚', label: 'Enrolled Courses', value: '3', sub: '2 in progress', color: 'mint' }, { icon: '🎯', label: 'Profile Match', value: '78%', sub: 'Top 15%', color: 'cyan' }, { icon: '🏆', label: 'Certificates', value: '2', sub: 'Earned so far', color: 'amber' }, ]; const ACTIVITY = [ { icon: '✅', text: 'Applied to Frontend Developer Intern at Novarix Labs', time: '2 days ago', color: 'lavender' }, { icon: '📚', text: 'Enrolled in Full Stack Web Development Bootcamp', time: '4 days ago', color: 'mint' }, { icon: '🔍', text: 'Application viewed by Ether Analytics', time: '5 days ago', color: 'cyan' }, { icon: '🏆', text: 'Earned certificate: UI/UX Design Masterclass', time: '1 week ago', color: 'amber' }, { icon: '📝', text: 'Applied to Product Design Intern at Lumen Studio', time: '1 week ago', color: 'peach' }, ]; const DEADLINES = [ { role: 'Frontend Developer Intern', company: 'Novarix Labs', date: '10 Jun', urgency: 'hot' }, { role: 'Data Science Intern', company: 'Ether Analytics', date: '25 Jun', urgency: 'warm' }, { role: 'DevOps Intern', company: 'Stratos Cloud', date: '28 May', urgency: 'cold' }, ]; export default function StudentHome({ user }) { const name = user?.name || 'Student'; const firstName = name.split(' ')[0]; const recommended = internships.slice(0, 3); const hour = new Date().getHours(); const greeting = hour < 12 ? 'Good morning' : hour < 17 ? 'Good afternoon' : 'Good evening'; return (
